Done! All 7 tests pass, including the new one:

- **`interpretTuff("1U8 + 2U8") => 3`** ✅

The changes made to [`index.ts`](index.ts):
- Added support for parsing addition expressions like `"1U8 + 2U8"` using a regex that matches two Tuff literals separated by `+`.
- Extracted the literal-parsing logic into a helper function `parseTuffLiteral()` so both single values and addition operands can be validated against their type ranges.
